title: Responses Runner V2 Review Decision

schema_version.description: Schema version identifier for this artifact contract.

decision_id.description: Stable identifier for one review decision record.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this artifact was created.

supervisor_session_id.description: Stable identifier for the supervisor session.

workflow_id.description: Stable identifier for the workflow that owns this artifact.

run_id.description: Stable identifier for one workflow run.

stage_id.description: Stable identifier for the workflow stage.

review_cycle_id.description: Stable identifier for the supervisor review cycle.

review_kind.description: Kind of artifact being reviewed by this decision.

actor_role.description: Role of the actor that produced this decision.

agent_command_id.description: Identifier for the concrete agent command invocation.

status.description: Current lifecycle status for this artifact.

approval_decision.description: Overall approval, rejection, or blocking decision.

summary.description: Concise human-readable summary of this artifact.

markdown_report_path.description: Repository-relative path to the markdown report for this decision.

json_report_path.description: Repository-relative path to the JSON report for this decision.

reviewed_artifacts.description: Artifacts inspected while producing this review decision.

missing_artifacts.description: Required artifacts that were unavailable during review.

blocking_issues.description: Issues that block approval or progression.

non_blocking_improvements.description: Improvement suggestions that do not block progression.

recommendations.description: Actionable review recommendations with evidence and disposition.

unsupported_claims.description: Claims found during review that lacked sufficient evidence.

evidence.description: Evidence entries supporting this artifact or decision.

command.description: Command metadata for the agent invocation that produced this artifact.

read_only_check.description: Workspace snapshot check proving whether a reviewer stayed read-only.

validation_errors.description: Validation errors found while parsing or checking this artifact.

next_action.description: Recommended next supervisor or operator action.
